name: DnsLookup
description: Resolve DNS records (A/AAAA/CNAME/TXT/NS) from the agent—nslookup-style network validation.
helpMarkDown: Tip: use a custom resolver (e.g. 8.8.8.8) to bypass restrictive corporate DNS and validate external resolution.
author: https://github.com/microsoft/Network_Preflight-Extension

inputs.name: targets
inputs.label: Hostnames
inputs.helpMarkDown: One hostname per line (e.g., microsoft.com, api.contoso.com)

inputs.name: resolver
inputs.label: Custom DNS server (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify a DNS server (IPv4/IPv6, e.g. 8.8.8.8 or 1.1.1.1). If empty, the agent's default resolver is used.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.label: Timeout (seconds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum time to wait for each DNS query before failing.

inputs.name: retries
inputs.label: Retries
inputs.helpMarkDown: Number of retry attempts per hostname if DNS resolution fails.
